MENDIOLA RE: JUDGMENT OF C/S AND HEALTH CARE ON JAN-07-2002 CONTINUED TO CHILD SUPPORT SERVICES CALENDAR ON APR-08-2002 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 416 - PER JUDGE'S ORDER(416) GENERAL ADVISEMENT GIVEN RE COMMISSIONER ACTING AS JUDGE PRO TEM; FATHER NOT PRESENT, MOTHER PRESENT IN PRO PER, CSA=DESBROSSES; COURT ORDERS THAT MOTHER PAY LOW GUIDELINE CHILD SUPPORT $75.00 FOR CHILD BORN 1/9/96 PER MONTH BY WAGE ASSIGNMENT COMMENCING 1/1/02; GUIDELINE SUPPORT =$272.00; COURT MAKES A FINDING OF PARENTAGE FOR THE CHILDREN DOB 1/9/96 AND 7/2/98; EITHER PARTY MAY RESTORE MATTER TO CALENDAR WITHOUT A CHANGE OF CIRCUMSTANCES; CONTINUED TO 4/8/02 @ 8:30AM IN ROOM 416 SO THIS MATTER MAY BE HEARD WITH FATHER'S CASE; COURT RESERVES JURISDICTION TO REVIEW CHILD SUPPORT. (TILLINGHAST)PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY LORETTA NAJERA CSR #5153; CLERK LESLEY M. SADHU.
